title: MythrOS Foundry Bridge
description: MythrOS ⇄ Foundry VTT (dnd5e) bridge for KoTT.gg / Ashreach: two-way chat + dice-roll relay, HP/economy live sync, account provisioning, MythrOS combat augmentation (hidden monster HP, async turn-prep declarations, permadeath), AND a fully two-way combat mirror — a Foundry fight mirrors into the live Discord combat tracker and Discord-side combat actions push back into Foundry tokens + turn order — over one socket. D&D 5e only.
